case_title: MARY BETH KNIGHT VS. CARLA BEYER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, MARY BETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEYER, CARLA $435.20 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.20, THE TOTAL DAMAGES SUFFERED BY PLAINTIFF IS $870.40 FOR WHICH DEFENDANT IS 50% RESPONSIBLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BEYER, CARLA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KNIGHT, MARY BETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BEYER, CARLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT KNIGHT, MARY BETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT KNIGHT, MARY BETH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $870.43 FILED BY KNIGHT, MARY BETH AS TO DEFENDANT BEYER, CARLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT BEYER, CARLA AS TO PLAINTIFF KNIGHT, MARY BETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED.JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED NOV-29-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEYER, CARLA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.
